checks.name: Maximum Leverage Ratio
checks.evidence: Consolidated Total Debt as of 2014-03-31 divided by trailing-4-quarter Consolidated Adjusted EBITDA (sum of quarters 2013Q2, 2013Q3, 2013Q4, 2014Q1). Use the most conservative definition of debt (including all financial indebtedness, guarantees, and off-balance-sheet items) and EBITDA (excluding non-recurring gains, adding back non-cash charges, and deducting cash payments for restructuring).
